# Launch Screen Assets

Replace the PNG files in this folder with your actual launch screen image:
- `LaunchImage.png`    — 1× (e.g. 320×480)
- `LaunchImage@2x.png` — 2× (e.g. 640×960)
- `LaunchImage@3x.png` — 3× (e.g. 1242×2208)

A simple dark background with the WiseTVPlayer logo centred works best.
Background colour should match `#0A0A0F` (the app's background colour).
